fields.description: Primary upward tie: the committed BoQ Sheet this node belongs to. The boq link is kept denormalized and must equal this sheet's boq (enforced in the controller).
fields.label: BoQ Sheet

fields.description: Full effective classification from review (preamble/line_item/note/spacer/subtotal_marker/header_repeat). node_type is the priceability axis (Preamble/Line Item = priceable, Other = non-priceable); row_class is the taxonomy axis. A future pricing walk selects node_type in (Preamble, Line Item).
fields.label: Row Class

fields.description: Human-override classification (the why-is-this-line-here provenance). Free Data; the assignable vocabulary is enforced upstream, not enumerated here. Populated at commit; the node's effective classification is resolved before write.
fields.label: Human Classification

fields.description: Human-override parent (the -1 sentinel convention: -1 / unset = no override, >= 0 = reparent to that row index). Populated at commit; the resolved parent is written to parent_node.
fields.label: Human Parent

fields.description: Human re-rooted this node to top-level (Option B layer, orthogonal to human_parent).
fields.label: Human Root Override

fields.description: Per-area quantity breakdown. Total qty is the source of truth; sum of areas is informational.
fields.label: Qty by Area

fields.description: Brand and model identifier for this line item. Used in procurement reference.
fields.label: Make / Model

fields.description: Auto-set when qty=0 and at least one rate is set. Common in tender BoQs.
fields.label: Rate Only

fields.description: Reserved for future synthetic-row support; not produced by the current parser -- expected 0 on all present-corpus commits. Carried verbatim from the review row so the plumbing is ready if synthetic rows are ever produced.
fields.label: Is Synthetic

fields.description: Set to prevent automatic recomputation of amount fields
fields.label: Amount Override

fields.description: Per-column append-to-notes values carried verbatim from the review row. JSON object {header-or-letter: value} (dict, NOT a list). Distinct from the flat notes field and the attached_notes list.
fields.label: Append Notes Raw

fields.description: Transient: populated by frontend before user edit, cleared after audit entry is written
fields.label: Edit Reason

fields.description: Source BoQ Review Row name (BOQRR-...) this node was committed from. Human-readable provenance tie. MAY DANGLE after a re-parse (review rows are non-durable / deleted+recreated on re-parse) -- it is the readable link, NOT the durable key. The durable key is commit_provenance_id.
fields.label: Review Row Name

fields.description: Commit-minted stable provenance id (frappe.generate_hash). The DURABLE provenance key -- survives review-row churn (re-parse deletes/recreates review rows, but this id stays on the committed node).
fields.label: Commit Provenance Id

fields.description: Pre-commit review edit history, carried verbatim from the review row. List of {field, from, to, by, at, reason} (+ optional area / rate_subkey on per-area edits). Stored opaque -- the element shape is not validated here. KEPT on the node: Nirmaan Versions tracks only post-commit scalar edits and cannot reconstruct this pre-commit history.
fields.label: Edit Log

fields.description: Human annotation carried from the review row (not an edit; no provenance side-effects).
fields.label: Remarks

fields.description: Notes attached to this node, carried verbatim from the review row as a structured list. Stored opaque -- the element shape is parser-defined and not validated here. Distinct from the flat notes field; do not fold into notes.
fields.label: Attached Notes

fields.description: Per-(boq, sheet) commit version. Shared with the committed grid + BoQ Sheet for the same commit. Set by the Phase-5 commit pipeline (Slice 3b).
fields.label: Commit Version

fields.description: Exactly one current version per (boq, sheet). Enforced by the commit pipeline (freeze prior on re-commit), NOT this controller.
fields.label: Is Current

fields.description: Commit timestamp; set by the Phase-5 commit pipeline (Slice 3b).
fields.label: Committed At
